arts.ttl: Manchester United REJECT £40million Alejandro Garnacho transfer bid
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho's future at Old Trafford is up in the air with the youngster having yet to prove himself to Ruben Amorim and the club looking to sell players to fund reshaping the squad again this month

arts.ttl: Manchester United star suspended due to little-known Premier League rule
arts.sum: He served his suspension in the following Premier League game against Brentford, allowing him to return to the squad for the FA Cup semi-final against Coventry. Dalot is one of few players in United squad that appears suited to the demanding position, making the search for a replacement tricky.

arts.ttl: Rashford and Hojlund branded 'unfit for relegation fight' by Man Utd legend as Garnacho transfer exit closes in
arts.sum: Former Red Devil Paul Parker was scathing about certain players as he calls for better recruitment

arts.ttl: Brentford player seen as alternative if Serie A side can’t sign Manchester United forward
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Italian media that Napoli are showing interest in Brentford forward Mikkel Damsgaard. It’s been well reported in recent days the Serie A side are in the market for a left winger, with Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on the verge of signing for French giants PSG. Arena Napoli journalist Gianluca Vitale today reports The post Brentford player seen as alternative if Serie A side can’t sign Manchester United forward appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man Utd keep Osimhen DREAM alive with €40m Garnacho decision
arts.sum: But United may try to use their player as bait for Victor Osimhen, who has made it clear he wants to leave Napoli and is currently on loan at Galatasaray in the Turkish Super Lig. It’s a difficult deal for the Red Devils, as transfer expert Ben Jacobs outlined . Manchester United retain a key figure in their hope of landing dream striker target Victor Osimhen after making a crucial decision over the future of Alejandro Garnacho .

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford swap deal mooted involving £63m man heading to Man United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been heavily linked with a move to AC Milan in recent weeks, and Manchester United legend Dwight Yorke has suggested a potential swap deal with the Italian giants

arts.ttl: Amorim: Matches like Southampton are where we build our identity
arts.sum: And the response he got was positive, with his side drawing 2-2 at league leaders Liverpool before winning their FA Cup third-round tie at Arsenal on penalties, where United played for nearly an hour with 10 men following Diogo Dalot's dismissal. Ruben Amorim believes he will learn more about his players in Thursday night's Premier League match against bottom club Southampton than in their previous two encounters against Liverpool and Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Man United risk transfer history repeating itself which won’t please Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson won't be happy over reports linking Alejandro Garnacho with a move away from Manchester United after his previous comments dubbing the youngster the 'heart and soul' of the club

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford transfer latest - three options ruled out, medical failed, Man United stance
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's representatives are looking for a solution for the forward to leave Manchester United this month

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Southampton: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United hope to win their first Premier League match in a month when they host last-place Southampton.
